tree.name: P.J. Washington
tree.tradeDescription: DAL traded Seth Curry, Grant Williams, and a 2027 1st round pick (DAL own, protected) to CHA for P.J. Washington, a 2024 2nd (BOS own), and a 2028 2nd (least favorable)
tree.note: Kentucky forward, 2019 #12 overall pick by Charlotte

assetsGivenUp.name: Grant Williams
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: BOS traded Grant Williams to DAL. DAL traded Reggie Bullock and 2030 1st (swap) to SAS, and 2025 2nd (TOR own) and 2030 2nd (DAL own) to BOS. SAS traded 2024 2nd to BOS and 2025 2nd and 2028 2nd to DAL.

assetsGivenUp.name: Reggie Bullock
assetsGivenUp.note: UNC wing, signed as free agent from New York Knicks. Sent to SAS in Grant Williams 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 1st Round Pick Swap via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Right to swap 2030 1st round pick, sent to San Antonio

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (TOR own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Boston in Grant Williams 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Dallas own 2030 2nd round pick, sent to Boston

assetsGivenUp.name: Seth Curry
assetsGivenUp.note: Duke guard, undrafted 2013. Signed by Dallas as free agent.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Dallas own 2027 first-round pick, protected, sent to Charlotte
